posts.title: Divide and Conquer: The Role of Warps in Parallel Processing
posts.summary: In this review, we look at the role of warps in parallel processing in GPUs to try and understand what our machines are doing under the hood when training AI models.
posts.author: Melani Maheswaran

posts.title: Save up to $400 on Your Conference Tickets!
posts.summary: For the next two weeks, you can save up to $400 on Tickets to the Chatbot Conference 2024. Whether you’re a returning attendee or new to our community, this is the perfect chance to experience the future of AI and chatbot technology at a discounted rate. Here’s What You Can Expect: Insightful Keynotes: Hear from pioneers and innovators who are shaping the world of conversational AI. Interactive Workshops: Dive into hands-on sessions where you’ll learn to design and build AI-Agent in 48hrs and earn a Certification. Networking Opportunities : Connect with top industry leaders and peers in the…
posts.author: Stefan Kojouharov
